name: GOLFTEC Roseville
address: 2575 Fairview Ave N Suite 210, Roseville, MN 55113
about: GOLFTEC Roseville is a high-tech golf training facility that combines expert coaching with advanced motion measurement technology. The facility utilizes OPTIMOTION, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide precise feedback on swings and club performance. Lessons are personalized, with coaches creating actionable game plans based on data-driven insights. The studio also offers club fittings that leverage technology to match players with the optimal equipment, claiming an average of 21 additional yards off the tee.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
Personalized improvement plans with certified PGA coaches
Advanced club fitting technology for optimal equipment matching

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as part of their tech stack

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, and the facility provides clubs for lessons and fittings. You can also purchase custom-fit clubs through their pro shop.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, and there's no indication of outside food being allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole simulator play time isn't specified, as the facility focuses on lessons, practice, and fittings rather than full rounds.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior programs and mentions technology designed to help juniors understand their progress, making it suitable for young golfers.
